title: PacBio's (PACB) Q3 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Lag
text: Pacific Biosciences delivered adjusted loss per share of 32 cents in Q3 2022, narrower than the Zacks Consensus Estimate of 35 cents. PacBio registered revenues of $32.3 million in Q3 2022, down 7.4% year-over-year, which missed the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 8.5%. The consensus EPS Estimate was -$0.33 representing -43.5% year-over-year change and the consensus Revenue Estimate was $35.4 million with +1.5% year-over-year change. Over the preceding 3 months, EPS estimates had seen 1 upward revision and 0 downward revisions, while revenue estimates had seen 0 upward revisions and 5 downward revisions. PacBio had missed Wall Street's revenue estimates four times over the last two years, with expectations for company to stay the course heading into earnings.
